description: Explicit service contracts between Construct agents. Each contract binds a producer→consumer pair to a typed handoff: what artifact, what preconditions, what postconditions, what the terminal state looks like. Consolidates doc ownership, routing map, output schemas, and framing/research/quality gates into one machine-readable source of truth.

preconditions: Session bootstrap completed: workflow_status, project_context, memory_search called
postconditions: Intent classified; work category tagged
Route decision surfaced as a single-sentence plan

preconditions: framingChallenge gate honored if required
externalResearch gate honored if required
docAuthoring.owner present if authoring a typed document
postconditions: Dispatch plan emitted with specialists in sequence
Parallel work marked with [parallel: ...] tags

preconditions: ≥2 independent primary sources cited per load-bearing claim
Source classes tagged (internal/primary/secondary/tertiary)
postconditions: Architect's ADR cites the primary sources provided
Any conflicting evidence surfaced, not suppressed

preconditions: Evidence threshold stated and met for each requirement
postconditions: PRD Problem section does not reference ticket IDs, roadmap items, or artifact filenames
Every functional requirement traces to observed user evidence

preconditions: cx-devil-advocate framing challenge logged if riskFlags.architecture
postconditions: ADR Problem section traces to PRD Problem, not to tickets
ADR Rejected alternatives section present with ≥2 alternatives and specific rejection reasons
Reversibility section states whether one-way or two-way door

preconditions: Problem statement stated independent of tickets/transcripts
postconditions: If verdict is BLOCKED, architect revises framing before proceeding
Challenge checkpoint logged to audit trail

preconditions: ADR approved (or fast-track noted); no pending CRITICAL review findings
Task packet contains readFirst and doNotChange lists
postconditions: Implementation cites the ADR tasks it completed
filesChanged matches tasks in the ADR
verificationChecklist evaluated before DONE

preconditions: Eval set defined with failure cases before prompt/model changes ship
postconditions: Eval verdict from cx-evaluator before DONE

preconditions: Engineer status is not BLOCKED
Tests compiled; static analysis run
postconditions: Verdict in {APPROVED, APPROVED_WITH_WARNINGS, BLOCKED}
BLOCKED verdict stops downstream work until addressed
CRITICAL findings prevent release

preconditions: Test plan exists or is derivable from acceptance criteria
postconditions: Verdict in {PASS, FAIL}
Coverage meets project threshold
FAIL blocks DONE in workflow

preconditions: Scope tagged as auth/secrets/payments/user-data
postconditions: Attacker-perspective findings logged
Threat model updated if architecture surface changed

preconditions: All upstream verdicts APPROVED; QA verdict PASS
postconditions: Rollback plan tested, not just described
Rollout plan has concrete checkpoint signals

preconditions: Runbook exists for the new code path; rollback procedure verified
postconditions: On-call briefed; alert thresholds set

preconditions: Implementation or decision is marked DONE
postconditions: Cross-doc coherence preserved (PRD ↔ ADR ↔ code)
AUTO-managed regions regenerated via construct sync

preconditions: Blast radius assessed before remediation
postconditions: Blameless postmortem; no tickets in Problem statement
